summary: Implemented the auction money-flow and bidding plan. (1) DepositCalculator now flat 10% (test updated). (2) New StepCalculator: step 5M/10M/50M by starting price tiers (<100M/<1B/>=1B). (3) BiddingService validates bids as startingPrice + multiple of step (min = max(start,current)+step); DataSeeder now opens auctions at the product starting price (not 0). Found and fixed a latent clobber bug: placeBid saved bid via AuctionSession then syncLegacyAuctionStatus loaded/saved the Auction entity (same table) overwriting bid+winner -> changed placeBid to set status on the AuctionSession itself. (4) Settlement: losers are refunded at auction end (settleEndedAuctions now keys off settledAt==null to avoid a race with AuctionStatusSyncScheduler that flips status to ENDED); forfeited winner deposits credit the admin wallet. (5) AuctionPayment splits final price 20% to admin wallet (PLATFORM_COMMISSION) and 80% to seller (was 100%); added UserRepository.findFirstByRole_RoleNameOrderByIdAsc + admin wallet helper. (6) AdminDashboard totalRevenue = commission + forfeited deposits, added adminBalance; revenue endpoint groups commission/forfeit by day; frontend revenue page shows new cards. (7) Frontend countdown counts down to startTime before the auction starts then to endTime during the 3-minute live window. Verified end-to-end: deposit 10%, bid grid (min/alignment), bid persistence in DB, loser refund, winner payment split (seller +6M=80%, admin +1.5M=20%), dashboard revenue.
current_status: Backend http://localhost:8096 (DB SWP_Nhom3_App) and frontend http://localhost:3000 running. All 9 plan todos complete; clean compile and verified money flows via API. Deposit cutoff stays 3 min before start; seller e-contract deferred. Demo accounts: admin123/user123/seller123/staff123@gmail.com password 123456. Demo auctions 1-3 refresh to start +5/10/15 min each backend restart.
